creator: Pim de Morree

evidence.text: They experiment with self-management because their competitors are experimenting with it too. They “implement” Holacracy simply because it's something many hip start-ups have done, and they want to be hip too. Or they set up “Agile” transformations because they've read about it in Harvard Business Review. You know how it goes. The same disingenuous bullshit, repackaged.

relevance_evidence: The retained publisher-authored passage describes a concrete learning, feedback, evaluation, adaptation, or improvement mechanism.
rights_note: Only a bounded public evidence span is stored; no complete protected work is copied.
title: When Agile, Self-Management, and Holacracy Fail
